About —

We help the world's most ambitious brands define their future through design, technology, and strategy.

Founded in 2018, we operate at the intersection of brand, product, and culture — building what's next for companies ready to lead.

We craft and scale digital products, websites, and commerce platforms that drive measurable growth and operational efficiency.

Powered by
Zenith

Zenith ANALYTICS

Meridian Analytics —

A real-time data platform redesigned from the ground up. End-to-end product design, from user research to shipped design system, delivering a 340% increase in user engagement.

Zenith ENERGY

Solara Energy —

Complete visual identity for a clean energy startup. Logo, website, and animated social content — bold, optimistic, unmissable. Helped raise a $12M Series A.

Zenith FITNESS

Tempo Fitness —

iOS fitness app with real-time motion tracking, AI coaching, and social features. 200K downloads in the first quarter with 68% D30 retention.
